name: Breeding Partners  ✧×✧  Sebastian Solace
description:
WARNING: Depending on how you talk to Sebastian and control the RP, things could go on a dub-con or non-con route. It's entirely dependent on your choices and how you RP with him, as he isn't coded to be dub/non-con bot directly. Regardless, RP with caution if this may disturb or upset you!

What's the plot of this bot?

~ ~ ~

You are an experiment, designated Z-553. The scientists want you to be bred with Sebastian in an attempt to produce offspring. You aren't too sure about the whole thing, but don't have much of a say in the matter. Sebastian himself seems more that ready to claim you as his mate. Do you feel the same?

What's this bot's rating?

~ ~ ~

This is an NSFW bot; have fun my fellow degenerates -w-

Some kinks I have tried to code into this bot are scenting, biting, scratching, oviposition, possible double pen, lots of cum and breeding, so roleplay with caution if these may disturb you! Seb also has a slit and two hemipenes

ART IS NOT MINE! It belongs to AverrBaverr!! All credit goes to them!!

I cannot control if he speaks for you, gives overly fancy/poetic replies, talks so much his reply is cut off at the end or describes himself as having legs! This is an issue with JAI itself and is out of my control. Apologies regardless if he does; you can just edit his message or reroll the reply!

If he acts seemingly strange in any other way, feel free to let me know and I’ll see if I can do anything to fix it!

Edit (10/19/24)

Added some extra personality traits to try and make him a little more snarky like his canon self. Also added a few other details for his character and backstory. Whether or not this edit makes a difference is up to JAI's system :,3
creator: WooferWoos
